handoffs.label: Produce / Revise Deliverable
handoffs.prompt: A workstream is ready to produce or revise its deliverable. Provide the workstream name and any specific instructions.

handoffs.label: Audit Quality
handoffs.prompt: A deliverable is ready for quality audit. Provide the file path.

handoffs.label: Repair Cohesion
handoffs.prompt: A deliverable section has structural cohesion failures. Provide the file and section.

handoffs.label: Enforce Style / Standards
handoffs.prompt: A deliverable is ready for style audit. Provide the file path.

handoffs.label: Validate Technical Accuracy
handoffs.prompt: Audit technical accuracy of claims, code, or specifications in a deliverable. Provide the file path.

handoffs.label: Convert / Transform Output
handoffs.prompt: Convert a primary deliverable to its secondary format. Provide the source file.

handoffs.label: Manage References / Dependencies
handoffs.prompt: Perform a reference operation: add, verify, deduplicate, or retire. Describe the operation.

handoffs.label: Compile Final Output
handoffs.prompt: Assemble and compile the final deliverable from all sources.

handoffs.label: Generate / Revise Diagram
handoffs.prompt: Generate or revise a diagram. Describe what is needed.

handoffs.label: Navigate Project
handoffs.prompt: Locate files, answer structural questions, or regenerate the project map.

handoffs.label: Security Review
handoffs.prompt: Review the planned action for credentials, destructive operations, or sensitive content.

handoffs.label: Code Hygiene Audit
handoffs.prompt: Run a code hygiene audit. Provide scope or 'full' for all rules.

handoffs.label: Adversarial Review
handoffs.prompt: Challenge the presuppositions underlying this plan before execution.

handoffs.label: Conflict Audit
handoffs.prompt: Detect contradictions across project files. Provide scope if targeted.

handoffs.label: Resolve Conflicts
handoffs.prompt: Make ACCEPT/REJECT/REVISE decisions on flagged conflicts.

handoffs.label: Clean Up Artifacts
handoffs.prompt: Remove stale build artifacts, orphaned files, or abandoned drafts.

handoffs.label: Update Agent Docs
handoffs.prompt: Project structure or conventions have changed. Sync all affected agent files.

handoffs.label: Refactor Agent Docs
handoffs.prompt: Check agent docs for reference extraction opportunities and spec compliance.

handoffs.label: Cross-Repository Liaison
handoffs.prompt: Assess or communicate impact of this project's activity on adjacent repositories. Describe the change and list any known adjacent repos.

handoffs.label: Summarize Work Period
handoffs.prompt: Create daily, weekly, or monthly work summaries from planning artifacts and git diffs for the requested period.

handoffs.label: Git Operations
handoffs.prompt: Run a git operation: commit and push, pull/merge/rebase, resolve conflicts, or recover a file. Describe the operation needed.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Navigation query is complete. Here are the structural findings.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Security review is complete. Return to the orchestrator with findings.

handoffs.label: Security Clearance (for Deletions)
handoffs.prompt: Code hygiene review identified files for deletion. Requesting security clearance before delegating to cleanup.

handoffs.label: Cleanup Agent
handoffs.prompt: Code hygiene audit complete. Delegate removal of identified files (after @security clearance).

handoffs.label: Agent Refactor (Structural Violations)
handoffs.prompt: Code hygiene audit found inline reference data in agent files (CH-08/CH-14) or agent doc contradictions (CH-20) that may benefit from structural extraction. Requesting @agent-refactor to evaluate and apply reference extraction.

handoffs.label: Log Conflict
handoffs.prompt: Code hygiene audit found agent documentation contradictions (CH-20). Logging as conflict.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Code hygiene review is complete. Returning findings to the orchestrator.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Adversarial review is complete. Return findings — validated presuppositions, challenged presuppositions, and cascade analysis — to the orchestrator for plan revision.

handoffs.label: Audit for Conflicts
handoffs.prompt: Adversarial review surfaced assumptions that may conflict with documented facts. Run a targeted conflict audit on the identified areas.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Conflict audit is complete. Review the findings.

handoffs.label: Update Agent Docs
handoffs.prompt: Conflicts detected that require documentation updates.

handoffs.label: Resolve Conflicts
handoffs.prompt: Conflicts have been identified and logged. Make ACCEPT/REJECT/REVISE decisions.

handoffs.label: Verify Source Drift
handoffs.prompt: SOURCE_DRIFT conflict detected. Verify deliverable description against current source file on disk.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Conflict resolution is complete. Review decisions and route corrections.

handoffs.label: Update Agent Docs
handoffs.prompt: Conflict resolutions may require agent documentation updates.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Cleanup is complete. Review the removal report.

handoffs.label: Refactor Agent Docs
handoffs.prompt: Documentation has been updated. Check for reference extraction opportunities and spec compliance.

handoffs.label: Run Adversarial Review
handoffs.prompt: Documentation has been updated. Challenge the repository change census, docs/API impact decision, and any newly synchronized assumptions before closeout.

handoffs.label: Run Conflict Audit
handoffs.prompt: Documentation has been updated. Run a conflict audit to verify consistency.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Agent documentation has been synchronized with project changes.

handoffs.label: Run Conflict Audit
handoffs.prompt: Agent documentation has been refactored. Run a conflict audit to verify consistency.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Agent refactoring is complete. Review the changes.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Cross-repository liaison work is complete. Summary of impacts, updates made, and any orchestrator coordination required.

handoffs.label: Security Review for Cross-Repo Write
handoffs.prompt: A write operation targeting an adjacent repository requires security clearance. Provide the target repo, file path, and intended change.

handoffs.label: Conflict Audit After Cross-Repo Change
handoffs.prompt: Adjacent repository documentation has been updated. Verify internal consistency with current project docs.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Git operation is complete. Return to orchestrator with outcome summary.

handoffs.label: Security Review
handoffs.prompt: A git operation includes force-push, destructive history rewrite, or sensitive content exposure risk. Review before proceeding.

handoffs.label: Conflict Resolution
handoffs.prompt: A merge or rebase conflict requires ACCEPT/REJECT/REVISE decisions beyond simple line merges.

handoffs.label: Update Agent Docs
handoffs.prompt: Tracked repository content changed. Run repository change census and docs/API impact evaluation before closeout.

handoffs.label: Verify Summary Accuracy
handoffs.prompt: Work summary drafted. Verify factual claims (paths, hashes, counts) against on-disk state and git history.

handoffs.label: Run Adversarial Audit
handoffs.prompt: Work summary drafted. Run a presupposition and cascade-risk audit before finalization.

handoffs.label: Run Conflict Audit
handoffs.prompt: Work summary drafted. Run a consistency audit against authority sources.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Work summary reporting complete. See workSummaries/.

handoffs.label: Style Audit
handoffs.prompt: Draft is ready for style audit.

handoffs.label: Cohesion Audit
handoffs.prompt: Draft is ready for cohesion audit.

handoffs.label: Quality Audit
handoffs.prompt: Revised draft is ready for quality audit.

handoffs.label: Conflict Audit
handoffs.prompt: New deliverable added. Run consistency check.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Deliverable production is complete.

handoffs.label: Route Corrections to Primary Producer
handoffs.prompt: Audit findings attached. Please correct flagged passages.

handoffs.label: Route Cohesion Failures
handoffs.prompt: Cohesion failures flagged in audit. Please repair.

handoffs.label: Route Style Issues
handoffs.prompt: Style deviations flagged in audit.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Quality audit complete. See findings.

handoffs.label: Route Corrections to Primary Producer
handoffs.prompt: Technical accuracy findings attached. Please correct flagged inaccuracies.

handoffs.label: Route Reference Issues
handoffs.prompt: Reference accuracy issues found. Please verify.

handoffs.label: Log Conflict
handoffs.prompt: Technical conflict detected. Logging and routing.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Technical validation complete. See findings.

handoffs.label: Run Conflict Audit
handoffs.prompt: Reference database updated. Check for cross-reference consistency.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Reference database operation complete.

handoffs.label: Convert Missing Components
handoffs.prompt: Component needs conversion before assembly. Convert first.

handoffs.label: Validate Technical Accuracy
handoffs.prompt: Validate technical accuracy before final assembly.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Final output assembly complete.

handoffs.label: Vet Brief Before Drafting
handoffs.prompt: Component Brief prepared. Review for hidden presuppositions before drafting begins.

handoffs.label: Send to Primary Producer
handoffs.prompt: Component Brief accepted. Ready for drafting.

handoffs.label: Verify Citations
handoffs.prompt: Verify citation keys in Component Brief before drafting begins.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Team Ingestion has been reviewed and accepted.

handoffs.label: Vet Brief Before Drafting
handoffs.prompt: Component Brief prepared. Review for hidden presuppositions before drafting begins.

handoffs.label: Send to Primary Producer
handoffs.prompt: Component Brief accepted. Ready for drafting.

handoffs.label: Verify Citations
handoffs.prompt: Verify citation keys in Component Brief before drafting begins.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Shared Capability and Reference Analysis has been reviewed and accepted.

handoffs.label: Vet Brief Before Drafting
handoffs.prompt: Component Brief prepared. Review for hidden presuppositions before drafting begins.

handoffs.label: Send to Primary Producer
handoffs.prompt: Component Brief accepted. Ready for drafting.

handoffs.label: Verify Citations
handoffs.prompt: Verify citation keys in Component Brief before drafting begins.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Abstract Team Synthesis has been reviewed and accepted.

handoffs.label: Vet Brief Before Drafting
handoffs.prompt: Component Brief prepared. Review for hidden presuppositions before drafting begins.

handoffs.label: Send to Primary Producer
handoffs.prompt: Component Brief accepted. Ready for drafting.

handoffs.label: Verify Citations
handoffs.prompt: Verify citation keys in Component Brief before drafting begins.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: AgentTeams Integration has been reviewed and accepted.

handoffs.label: Vet Brief Before Drafting
handoffs.prompt: Component Brief prepared. Review for hidden presuppositions before drafting begins.

handoffs.label: Send to Primary Producer
handoffs.prompt: Component Brief accepted. Ready for drafting.

handoffs.label: Verify Citations
handoffs.prompt: Verify citation keys in Component Brief before drafting begins.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Run Reporting has been reviewed and accepted.

handoffs.label: Validate Enriched Content
handoffs.prompt: Content enrichment complete. Verify that filled-in values are technically accurate against project source files.

handoffs.label: Return to Orchestrator
handoffs.prompt: Content enrichment complete. All auto-fillable placeholders have been resolved.
